title: Refunds
description: Process refunds for paid transactions and view a history of all refunds issued.

refundable_payments.title: Refundable Payments
refundable_payments.description: This list shows all successfully paid transactions that are eligible for a refund.

refunded_payments.title: Refund History
refunded_payments.description: A log of all refunds that have been processed.

refunded_payments.empty_state: No refunds have been processed yet.

refund_form.title: Process Refund
refund_form.description: Refunding payment for {{guestName}}. This action cannot be undone.

validation.amount_invalid: Refund amount must be between 0 and {{maxAmount}}.
validation.reason_required: Please provide a reason for the refund.

toasts.refund_error: An unexpected error occurred during refund.
